---
title: "P4_Metagenomics_analyses_Final"
output: html_document
date: "2026-01-09"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
library(ggplot2)          #3.5.0
library(ggExtra)          #0.10.1
library(dplyr)            #1.1.2
library(phyloseq)         #1.46.0
library(vegan)
library(Maaslin2)         #1.12.0
library(ape)              #5.7.1
library(readxl)           #1.4.3     
library(microViz)         #0.12.0
library(ggside)           #0.3.1
library(patchwork)        #1.2
library(ComplexHeatmap)   #2.14.0
library(tidyr)            #1.3.1
library(readr)            #2.1.5
library(reshape2)         #1.4.4
library(rstatix)          #0.7.2
library(ggpubr)           #0.6.0
library(NatParksPalettes) #0.2.0
library(cowplot)          #1.1.2
library(stringr)          #1.5.1
library(Boruta)           #8.0.0 
library(caret)            #6.0-94
library(VIM)              #6.2.2 
library(corpcor)
library(corrplot)
library(Hmisc)
library(ANCOMBC)          #2_4.0   
library(MTXmodel)         #1.2.4
library(forcats)          #1.0.0
library(tidyverse)        #2.0.0  
library(scales)           #1.3.0
library(microbiome)
library(lme4)
library(broom)
library(MuMIn)
library(emmeans)
library(patchwork)
library(DirichletMultinomial)
library(lattice)
library(xtable)
library(parallel)
library(RColorBrewer)
library(e1071)
library(doParallel)
library(kableExtra)
library("anytime") 
library(tibble) # for rownames_to_column() function
library(stringr) # for str_squish()
library(flextable)
library(officer)
library(forcats)
library(tableone)
library(webshot2)
library(randomForest)


source("GM_development_functions.R")
source("~/Documents/GitHub/Preterm_Plasmidome/GM_development/customtab.R")

meta_data_path <- "~/Documents/GitHub/Preterm_Plasmidome/GM_development/260202_P4_GM_dev_meta_updated_groupings_v2.xlsx"

cat_var <- c("Sample_ID", "Patient", "Cohort", "abx_group", "BSI_exp_type", "Necrotizing_enterocolitis", "Received_antimicrobials", "Sequencing_runs","duplicate_count","Cohorts","Sex","Delivery_route","Maternal_ethnicity","Maternal_race","Site","Final_disposition",
             "Para", "Maternal_smoking",	"Maternal_alcohol",	"Maternal_substance_abuse",	"Maternal_preeclampsia",	"Maternal_diabetes",	"Maternal_chorioamnionitis","Maternal_hypertension", "mat_inpt_antimicrobe","mat_outpt_antimicrobial","Multiple_births", "PMA_bin")

num_var <- c("DOL","MOL","abx_exposure_count","Gestational_age_weeks", "Birthweight","Maternal_age_at_delivery","Gravida","antiviral_exposure", "aminoglycoside_exposure","penicillin_exposure","macrolide_exposure","firstgencephalosporin_exposure",
             "fourthgencephalosporin_exposure","thirdgencephalosporin_exposure","secondgencephalosporin_exposure","lincosamide_exposure",
             "antifungal_exposure","carbapenem_exposure","other_antimicrobials_exposure","other_non_antimicrobials_exposure","glycopeptide_exposure","med_exposure_count", "morphine_exposure", "fentanyl_exposure", "surfactant_exposure", "acetaminophen_exposure", "caffeine_exposure", "cholecalciferol_vit_d__exposure",	'vitamin_a_exposure',	'famotidine_pepcid__exposure',	'iron_exposure',	'calcium_gluconate_exposure',	'dopamine_exposure',	'adenosine_exposure',	'cosyntropin_cortrosyn_acth__exposure',	'bumetanide_bumax__exposure',	'other_exposure',	'indomethacin_exposure',	'multi_vitamin_with_iron_exposure',	'lasix_exposure',	'atropine_exposure',	'dobutamine_exposure',	'sodium_chloride_exposure',	'levothyroxine_exposure',	'dexamethasone_exposure',	'phenobarbitol_exposure',	'hydrocortisone_exposure',	'ibuprofen_exposure',	'chlorathiazide_diuril__exposure',	'midazolam_versed__exposure',	'potassium_chloride_exposure',	'hepatitis_b_immune_globulin_exposure',	'citric_acid_sodium_citrate_bicitra__exposure',	'pancuronium_or_vecurionium_exposure',	'insulin_exposure',	'immunoglobulin_other_exposure',	'multi_vitamin_no_iron_exposure',	'levocarnitine_exposure',	'digoxin_exposure',	'hydraluronidase_hydase__exposure',	'lorazapam_ativan__exposure',	'sodium_bicarbonate_exposure','hydrochlorathiazide_hydrodiuril__exposure',	'spironolactone_hydrochlorathiazide_aldactazide__exposure',	'tocopherol_acetate_vit_e__exposure','cum_days_formula','cum_days_milk','frac_days_formula', 'frac_days_milk')

custom_colors_abx <- c("None" = "#8E949F", "Early only" = "#44637D", "After only" = "#613921", "Early and after" = "#AAC9ED")
custom_colors_groups <- c("None" = "#8E949F", "Early only" = "#44637D", "Early and after" = "#AAC9ED", "Near-term" = "#613921")
custom_colors_names <- c("ABN" = "#8E949F", "EEO" = "#44637D", "EAS" = "#AAC9ED", "Near-term" = "#613921")
```

# Load data
```{r}
## Metaphlan3 tree used in Aura's paper ###
m3.tree.Jan19 <- ape::read.tree(paste0(getwd(),"/datasets/mpa_v30_CHOCOPhlAn_201901_species_tree.nwk.txt"))
m3.tree.Jan19$tip.label <- gsub('GCA_[0-9]+\\|', '', m3.tree.Jan19$tip.label)

# Read the metaphlan3 table
mphlan <- data.frame(read.table("~/Library/CloudStorage/Box-Box/pppp/GM_development_cohort/Metaphlan/250318_P4_GM_dev_metaphlan3_merged_n2585_v2.txt", header = T, sep="\t", skip=1, check.names = FALSE))

# R adds an "X" to column names that start with a number. Steps to remove this below
#colnames(mphlan) <- gsub("^X([0-9])", "\\1", colnames(mphlan))
colnames(mphlan) <- as.character(colnames(mphlan))

metadata <- read_excel(meta_data_path)

## Processing data for phyloseq
rownames(mphlan) <- mphlan$clade_name
mphlan$clade_name <- NULL

## Create species data for phyloseq 
# keep rows with species info 
#mphlan.species <- mphlan
mphlan.species <- mphlan[grepl('s__', rownames(mphlan)), ]
# Drop rows with SBG (species level genome bins)
mphlan.species <- mphlan.species[!grepl('t__', rownames(mphlan.species)), ]
mphlan.species <- mphlan.species %>% dplyr::select_if(~sum(.) != 0)
mphlan.species <- as.matrix(mphlan.species)

## Create taxa table
species <- data.frame(Names = rownames(mphlan.species))
species <- data.frame(do.call('rbind', strsplit(as.character(species$Names), '|', fixed = TRUE)))
rownames(species) <- rownames(mphlan.species)
colnames(species) <- c('Domain', 'Phylum', 'Class', 'Order', 'Family', 'Genus', 'Species')
species <- as.matrix(species)

## Metadata
rows_metadata <- rownames(metadata)[colnames(mphlan.species) %in% metadata$Sample_ID_R_final]
metadata <- data.frame(metadata)
rownames(metadata) <- metadata$Sample_ID_R_final

# Set categorical variables to factor
metadata[,cat_var] <- lapply(metadata[,cat_var], factor)
# Set numerical variables to numeric
metadata[,num_var] <- lapply(metadata[,num_var], as.numeric)
print(dim(metadata))

# Differences between metadata rows and metaphlan column names 
## These are samples that we have dropped because we have other samples from the same DOL  
print(setdiff(colnames(mphlan.species), rownames(metadata)))

ps <- phyloseq(otu_table(mphlan.species, taxa_are_rows = TRUE),
               sample_data(metadata),
               tax_table(species), 
               phy_tree(m3.tree.Jan19)) 

#ps.filt <- prune_taxa(taxa_sums(ps)>0.01, ps)
ps.filt <- filter_taxa(ps, function(x) mean(x) > 0.01, TRUE)
ps.filt  <- transform_sample_counts(ps.filt, function(x) (x / sum(x))*100)

### Filter to DOL 0-60 and remove After only infants ########
ps_filt_dol60 <- ps.filt %>% subset_samples(DOL <= 60) %>% subset_samples(abx_group_updated != "After only")
ps_filt_dol60_meta <- data.frame(sample_data(ps_filt_dol60))

sample_data(ps_filt_dol60)$DOL_bin <- factor(sample_data(ps_filt_dol60)$DOL_bin)
sample_data(ps_filt_dol60)$abx_group_updated <- factor(sample_data(ps_filt_dol60)$abx_group_updated,
                                               levels = c("Early and after","Early only","None"))

###################### Merge with P4 cross-sectional cohort ###########
p4_mphlan <- data.frame(read.table("~/Library/CloudStorage/Box-Box/pppp/GM_development_cohort/Metaphlan/251020_P4_merged_metaphlan_n146.txt", header = T, sep="\t", check.names = FALSE))

## Processing data for phyloseq
rownames(p4_mphlan) <- p4_mphlan$clade_name
p4_mphlan$clade_name <- NULL

new_names <- colnames(p4_mphlan)
new_names <- gsub("^X", "", new_names)
new_names <- gsub("_", ".", new_names)
new_names <- paste0("p4_", new_names)

colnames(p4_mphlan) <- new_names

## Create species data for phyloseq 
# keep rows with species info 
p4_mphlan.species <- p4_mphlan[grepl('s__', rownames(p4_mphlan)), ]
# Drop rows with SBG (species level genome bins)
p4_mphlan.species <- p4_mphlan.species[!grepl('t__', rownames(p4_mphlan.species)), ]
p4_mphlan.species <- p4_mphlan.species %>% dplyr::select_if(~sum(.) != 0)
p4_mphlan.species <- as.matrix(p4_mphlan.species)

## Create taxa table
p4_species <- data.frame(Names = rownames(p4_mphlan.species))
p4_species <- data.frame(do.call('rbind', strsplit(as.character(p4_species$Names), '|', fixed = TRUE)))
rownames(p4_species) <- rownames(p4_mphlan.species)
colnames(p4_species) <- c('Domain', 'Phylum', 'Class', 'Order', 'Family', 'Genus', 'Species')
p4_species <- as.matrix(p4_species)

# Differences between metadata rows and metaphlan column names 
## These are samples that we have dropped because we have other samples from the same DOL  
print(setdiff(colnames(p4_mphlan.species), rownames(metadata)))

ps_p4 <- phyloseq(otu_table(p4_mphlan.species, taxa_are_rows = TRUE),
               sample_data(metadata),
               tax_table(p4_species)) 

#ps.filt <- prune_taxa(taxa_sums(ps)>0.01, ps)
ps_p4.filt <- filter_taxa(ps_p4, function(x) mean(x) > 0.01, TRUE)
ps_p4.filt  <- transform_sample_counts(ps_p4.filt, function(x) (x / sum(x))*100)

ps_p4_meta <- data.frame(phyloseq::sample_data(ps_p4.filt))

ps_p4.filt <- ps_p4.filt %>% subset_samples(abx_group_updated != "After only")
ps_p4.filt_meta <- data.frame(sample_data(ps_p4.filt))

sample_data(ps_p4.filt)$DOL_bin <- factor(sample_data(ps_p4.filt)$DOL_bin)
sample_data(ps_p4.filt)$abx_group_updated <- factor(sample_data(ps_p4.filt)$abx_group_updated,
                                               levels = c("Early and after","Early only","None"))

merged_ps <- merge_phyloseq(ps_filt_dol60, ps_p4.filt)
merged_ps_meta <- data.frame(sample_data(merged_ps))

merged_ps_meta <- merged_ps_meta %>% mutate(abx_group_names = case_when(abx_group_updated == "Early only" ~ "EEO",
                                                                          abx_group_updated == "Early and after" ~ "EAS",
                                                                          abx_group_updated == "None" ~ "ABN"))

merged_ps_meta$abx_group_names <- factor(merged_ps_meta$abx_group_names, levels = c("EAS", "EEO", "ABN"))
sample_data(merged_ps) <- merged_ps_meta

#save(merged_ps, file = "260202_merged_ps.RData")

#write.csv(merged_ps_meta, "260130_P4_GM_dev_metadata.csv", row.names = F)

```

### Load near-term data
```{r}
drewg_meta <- read_excel("~/Library/CloudStorage/Box-Box/pppp/GM_development_cohort/Metadata/240515_drewg_sample_metadata_v1.xlsx")

drewg_meta <- drewg_meta %>% filter(Cohort == "Gasparrini_term") 
drewg_meta <- drewg_meta[,1:7]

extra_meta <- read_excel("~/Library/CloudStorage/Box-Box/pppp/GM_development_cohort/Metadata/Drewg_term_metadata.xlsx") %>%
  filter(Group == "Term") %>% select(Sample, GestationalAgeWeeks, Birthweight,
                                     Gender, DeliveryMode, TotalAntimicrobialsDays)

extra_meta <- extra_meta %>% dplyr::rename(Sample_ID = Sample, 
                                    Gestational_age_weeks = GestationalAgeWeeks,
                                    Sex = Gender,
                                    Delivery_route = DeliveryMode,
                                    abx_exposure_count = TotalAntimicrobialsDays)

drewg_meta_final <- merge(drewg_meta, extra_meta, by = "Sample_ID")

drewg_meta_dol60 <- drewg_meta_final %>% filter(DOL <= 60)

drewg_mphln <- mphlan <- data.frame(read.table("~/Library/CloudStorage/Box-Box/pppp/GM_development_cohort/Metaphlan/251016_DrweG_term_n162_metaphlan3_merged.txt", header = T, sep="\t", skip=1, check.names = FALSE))
rownames(drewg_mphln) <- drewg_mphln$clade_name
drewg_mphln$clade_name <- NULL

drewg_mphlan.species <- drewg_mphln[grepl('s__', rownames(drewg_mphln)), ]
# Drop rows with SBG (species level genome bins)
drewg_mphlan.species <- drewg_mphlan.species[!grepl('t__', rownames(drewg_mphlan.species)), ]
drewg_mphlan.species <- drewg_mphlan.species %>% dplyr::select_if(~sum(.) != 0)
drewg_mphlan.species <- as.matrix(drewg_mphlan.species)

## Create taxa table
drewg_species <- data.frame(Names = rownames(drewg_mphlan.species))
drewg_species <- data.frame(do.call('rbind', strsplit(as.character(drewg_species$Names), '|', fixed = TRUE)))
rownames(drewg_species) <- rownames(drewg_mphlan.species)
colnames(drewg_species) <- c('Domain', 'Phylum', 'Class', 'Order', 'Family', 'Genus', 'Species')
drewg_species <- as.matrix(drewg_species)

## Metadata
rows_metadata <- rownames(drewg_meta_final)[colnames(drewg_mphlan.species) %in% drewg_meta_final$Sample_ID]
drewg_meta_final <- data.frame(drewg_meta_final)
rownames(drewg_meta_final) <- drewg_meta_final$Sample_ID

drewg_cat_var <- c("Sample_ID", "Patient", "Cohort", "Sex", "Delivery_route")
drewg_num_var <- c("DOL", "DOL_months", "PostmenstrualAgeDays","PostmenstrualAgeWeeks","Gestational_age_weeks","Birthweight",
                   "abx_exposure_count")
# Set categorical variables to factor
drewg_meta_final[,drewg_cat_var] <- lapply(drewg_meta_final[,drewg_cat_var], factor)
# Set numerical variables to numeric
drewg_meta_final[,drewg_num_var] <- lapply(drewg_meta_final[,drewg_num_var], as.numeric)
print(dim(drewg_meta_final))

# Differences between metadata rows and metaphlan column names 
## These are samples that we have dropped because we have other samples from the same DOL  
print(setdiff(colnames(drewg_mphlan.species), rownames(drewg_meta_final)))

# 160 samples and 341 species
ps_term <- phyloseq(otu_table(drewg_mphlan.species, taxa_are_rows = TRUE),
               sample_data(drewg_meta_final),
               tax_table(drewg_species)) 

# 160 samples and 179 species
ps_term <- filter_taxa(ps_term, function(x) mean(x) > 0.01, TRUE)
ps_term  <- transform_sample_counts(ps_term, function(x) (x / sum(x))*100)

### Filter to DOL 0-60 and remove After only infants ########
ps_term_dol100 <- ps_term %>% subset_samples(DOL <= 100)

ps_term_meta <- data.frame(phyloseq::sample_data(ps_term_dol100))

# Filter out samples past DOL 100 and create DOL bin
ps_term_meta <- ps_term_meta %>%
  mutate(DOL_bin = cut(DOL,
                       breaks = seq(0,100, by = 10),
                       labels = paste("DOL", seq(1, 91, by = 10), "-", seq(10, 100, by = 10)),
                       include.lowest = TRUE,
                       right = TRUE))


sample_data(ps_term_dol100) <- ps_term_meta

ps_term_dol60 <- ps_term_dol100 %>% subset_samples(DOL <= 60) 
ps_term_dol60_meta <- data.frame(sample_data(ps_term_dol60))

sample_data(ps_term_dol60)$DOL_bin <- factor(sample_data(ps_term_dol60)$DOL_bin)
sample_data(ps_term_dol60)$abx_group_updated <- "Near-term"

ps_term_dol60_meta <- data.frame(sample_data(ps_term_dol60))

breaks <- seq(23, 48, by = 3)
labels <- paste("PMA", head(breaks, -1), "-",tail(breaks, -1))

ps_term_dol60_meta$PMA_bin <- cut(
  ps_term_dol60_meta$PostmenstrualAgeWeeks,
  breaks = breaks,
  labels = labels,
  right = FALSE,  # left-inclusive, i.e., [23,26)
  include.lowest = TRUE
)


sample_data(ps_term_dol60) <- ps_term_dol60_meta

## Merge preterm and term phyloseq objects #########
ps_term_dol60_meta <- ps_term_dol60_meta %>% dplyr::rename(Sample_ID_R_final = Sample_ID) 
pterm_meta_simple <- merged_ps_meta %>% select(any_of(colnames(ps_term_dol60_meta)))
nterm_meta_simple <- ps_term_dol60_meta %>% select(everything(), -c(DOL_months, PostmenstrualAgeDays)) 
nterm_meta_simple$Sample_ID_R_final <- as.character(nterm_meta_simple$Sample_ID_R_final)
nterm_meta_simple$Delivery_route <- as.character(nterm_meta_simple$Delivery_route)
nterm_meta_simple$Delivery_route[nterm_meta_simple$Delivery_route == "Cesarean"] <- "Cesarean Section"
nterm_meta_simple$Delivery_route <- factor(nterm_meta_simple$Delivery_route)


ps_pterm_simple <- merged_ps
sample_data(ps_pterm_simple) <- pterm_meta_simple

ps_nterm_simple <- ps_term_dol60
sample_data(ps_nterm_simple) <- nterm_meta_simple

ps_infants <- merge_phyloseq(ps_pterm_simple, ps_nterm_simple)
ps_infants_meta <- data.frame(sample_data(ps_infants))
ps_infants_meta$abx_group_updated <- factor(ps_infants_meta$abx_group_updated)
ps_infants_meta <- ps_infants_meta %>% mutate(abx_group_names = case_when(abx_group_updated == "Early only" ~ "EEO",
                                                                          abx_group_updated == "Early and after" ~ "EAS",
                                                                          abx_group_updated == "None" ~ "ABN",
                                                                          abx_group_updated == "Near-term" ~ "Near-term"))
ps_infants_meta$abx_group_names <- factor(ps_infants_meta$abx_group_names, levels = c("EAS", "EEO", "ABN", "Near-term"))
#save(ps_infants, file = "251118_Preterm_near-term_merged_object.RData")

###### Add site to metadata #########
preterm_site <- merged_ps_meta %>% select(Sample_ID_R_final, Site)
ps_infants_meta2 <- ps_infants_meta %>% left_join(preterm_site, by = "Sample_ID_R_final") %>% mutate(Site = if_else(is.na(Site), "Home", Site))
ps_infants_meta2$Site <- factor(ps_infants_meta2$Site)

### Update cohort to study ###
ps_infants_meta2 <- ps_infants_meta2 %>% mutate(Study = case_when(Cohort == "BSI" ~ "Schwartz_et_al",
                                                                  Cohort == "Gasparrini_preterm" ~ "Gasparrini_et_al",
                                                                  Cohort == "Gasparrini_term" ~ "Gasparrini_et_al",
                                                                  Cohort == "Molly" ~ "Gibson_et_al",
                                                                  Cohort == "NEC_control" ~ "Thanert_et_al",
                                                                  Cohort == "No_abx_preterm" ~ "This_study",
                                                                  Cohort == "P4_cross_sectional" ~ "This_study"))
ps_infants_meta2$Study <- factor(ps_infants_meta2$Study)
rownames(ps_infants_meta2) <- ps_infants_meta2$Sample_ID_R_final
sample_data(ps_infants) <- ps_infants_meta2

ps_infants_meta <- data.frame(sample_data(ps_infants))
```

Table 1
```{r}
library(kableExtra)
library("anytime") 
library(tibble) # for rownames_to_column() function
library(stringr) # for str_squish()
library(flextable)
library(officer)
library(forcats)
library(tableone)
library(webshot2)

source("~/Documents/GitHub/Preterm_Plasmidome/GM_development/customtab.R")


meta_pt <- data.frame(sample_data(merged_ps))

# Set categorical variables as factors !!!!!!!!!!! Modify these as needed later !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!
categorical_vars <- c('Patient', 'Site','abx_group', 'Sex', 'Delivery_route', 'Necrotizing_enterocolitis', 'Cohort')

meta_pt[,categorical_vars] <- lapply(meta_pt[,categorical_vars], factor)

numerical_vars <- c("Birthweight", "abx_exposure_count", "Gestational_age_weeks")
meta_pt[,numerical_vars] <- lapply(meta_pt[,numerical_vars], as.numeric)

## All numerical variables are non-normal so we'll use median (IQR) instead of mean (SD)
normality_results <- lapply(numerical_vars, function(v) {
  p <- shapiro.test(meta_pt[[v]])$p.value
  data.frame(variable = v, p_value = p)
}) %>% bind_rows()


# Generate metadata comparison table 
comp_vars <- c("Birthweight", "abx_exposure_count", "Gestational_age_weeks", 'Site','Cohort', 'Sex', 'Delivery_route', 'Necrotizing_enterocolitis')


tab_pt <- CreateTableOne(vars=comp_vars,
                           strata='abx_group_names', 
                           data=meta_pt)
tab_plot_pt <- print(tab_pt, 
  showAllLevels = TRUE,
  quote        = FALSE,
  noSpaces     = TRUE,
  test         = TRUE,
  contDigits   = 1,
  nonnormal    = numerical_vars,  
  printToggle  = FALSE,
  dropEqual    = TRUE,
  explain      = FALSE)

# Convert to dataframe
tab_pt_df <- as.data.frame(tab_plot_pt) %>% rownames_to_column(var = "Variable")

# Set Table header
header <- str_squish(str_remove("Table 1. Infant demographics", "\n"))
# Set Table footer
footer <- str_squish(str_remove("Numbers are either No. or mean values", "\n"))
# Set custom_tab() defaults
customtab_defaults()
# Create the flextable object
flextable_processed_samples <- custom_tab(tab_pt_df, header, footer)

# Save as word .docx
save_as_docx(flextable_processed_samples, path = "~/Library/CloudStorage/Box-Box/pppp/GM_development_cohort/Analyses/Manuscript/No_AfterOnly/Re-grouped/Metadata/Table1.docx",
pr_section = prop_section(page_size = page_size(orient = "landscape"), type = "continuous"))

unique_infants_pt <- meta_pt %>%
  group_by(abx_group_updated, Site) %>%
  summarise(N = n_distinct(Patient), .groups = "drop_last") %>%
  mutate(
    total_site = sum(N),                 # total unique patients at this site
    prop = N / total_site                # proportion per group
  ) %>%
  ungroup()
write.csv(unique_infants_pt, "unique_infants_site_dist.csv", row.names = F)

abxN_meta <- meta_pt %>% filter(abx_group_updated == "None")
write.csv(abxN_meta, "251126_abxN_samples_meta.csv", row.names = F)

# 1. Count number of unique group labels per infant
group_changes <- ps_infants_meta %>%
  group_by(Patient) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(
    groups = n_distinct(abx_group_updated),
    unique_groups = paste(sort(unique(abx_group_updated)), collapse = ", ")
  ) %>%
  ungroup()
write.csv(group_changes, "260202_infants_that_change_abx_groups.csv", row.names = F)

###########-- Including near-term infants in the table ----############
meta_pt <- ps_infants_meta

eeo <- ps_infants_meta %>% filter(abx_group_names == "EEO")
abn <- ps_infants_meta %>% filter(abx_group_names == "ABN")
eas <- ps_infants_meta %>% filter(abx_group_names == "EAS")

meta_pt$Delivery_route[meta_pt$Delivery_route == "Cesarean"] <- "Cesarean Section"
meta_pt$Cohort[meta_pt$Cohort == "BSI_new"] <- "BSI"

# Set categorical variables as factors !!!!!!!!!!! Modify these as needed later !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!
categorical_vars <- c('Patient','abx_group_names', 'Sex', 'Delivery_route', 'Cohort')

meta_pt[,categorical_vars] <- lapply(meta_pt[,categorical_vars], factor)
meta_pt$Delivery_route <- factor(meta_pt$Delivery_route, levels = c("Cesarean Section", "Vaginal"))
meta_pt$Cohort <- factor(meta_pt$Cohort, levels = c("Molly", "Gasparrini_preterm", "Gasparrini_term", "BSI", "NEC_control", "No_abx_preterm", "P4_cross_sectional"))

numerical_vars <- c("Birthweight", "abx_exposure_count", "Gestational_age_weeks")
meta_pt[,numerical_vars] <- lapply(meta_pt[,numerical_vars], as.numeric)

## All numerical variables are non-normal so we'll use median (IQR) instead of mean (SD)

# Generate metadata comparison table 
comp_vars <- c("Birthweight", "abx_exposure_count", "Gestational_age_weeks",'Cohort', 'Sex', 'Delivery_route')


tab_pt <- CreateTableOne(vars=comp_vars,
                           strata='abx_group_names', 
                           data=meta_pt)
tab_plot_pt <- print(tab_pt, 
  showAllLevels = TRUE,
  quote        = FALSE,
  noSpaces     = TRUE,
  test         = TRUE,
  contDigits   = 1,
  nonnormal    = numerical_vars,  
  printToggle  = FALSE,
  dropEqual    = TRUE,
  explain      = FALSE)

# Convert to dataframe
tab_pt_df <- as.data.frame(tab_plot_pt) %>% rownames_to_column(var = "Variable")

# Set Table header
header <- str_squish(str_remove("Table 1. Infant demographics", "\n"))
# Set Table footer
footer <- str_squish(str_remove("Numbers are either No. or mean values", "\n"))
# Set custom_tab() defaults
customtab_defaults()
# Create the flextable object
flextable_processed_samples <- custom_tab(tab_pt_df, header, footer)

# Save as word .docx
save_as_docx(flextable_processed_samples, path = "~/Library/CloudStorage/Box-Box/pppp/GM_development_cohort/Analyses/Manuscript/No_AfterOnly/Re-grouped/Metadata/Table1_near-term.docx",
pr_section = prop_section(page_size = page_size(orient = "landscape"), type = "continuous"))


# 2. Filter infants who have more than one group label
changed_infants <- group_changes %>%
  filter(groups > 1)

# 3. View how many and which infants changed groups
n_changed <- nrow(changed_infants)
print(paste("Number of infants who changed group:", n_changed))
print(changed_infants)

```


## Alpha diversity
```{r}
ps.filt.trans <- transform_sample_counts(ps_infants, function(x) trunc(x*100000))
adiv <- estimate_richness(ps.filt.trans, measures=c('Observed', 'Shannon'))

sample_data(ps_infants)$Richness <- adiv$Observed
sample_data(ps_infants)$Shannon <- adiv$Shannon

ps.filt.meta <- data.frame(phyloseq::sample_data(ps_infants))
#write.csv(ps.filt.meta, "260201_ps_filt_meta.csv", row.names = F)

counts_by_bin <- ps.filt.meta %>%
  filter(!is.na(Richness), !is.na(abx_group_names)) %>%
  mutate(abx_group_names = droplevels(abx_group_names)) %>%
  count(DOL_bin, abx_group_names, name = "n") %>%
  group_by(DOL_bin) %>% mutate(groups_present = n_distinct(abx_group_names)) %>% ungroup()
write.csv(counts_by_bin, "260202_abx_exposure_n_by_group_names.csv", row.names = F)

## There are repeat samples and differences in DOL so we need to use linear models to account for these confounders
patient_repeats_per_DOL_bin <- ps.filt.meta %>%
  group_by(DOL_bin, Patient) %>% summarise(n_samples = n(), .groups = "drop")

########### Richness ##################
### Perform stat test and plot #######
lmer_emmeans_richness <- perform_emmeans_lmer(df = ps.filt.meta, facet_var = "DOL_bin", x_var = "abx_group_names", y_var = "Richness",
                                              fixed_effects = c("Gestational_age_weeks"),
                                              random_effects = c("(1|Patient)", "(1|Site)", "(1|Study)"),
                                              p.adjust.method = "BH",
                                              df_method = "kenward-roger")
write.csv(lmer_emmeans_richness, "260202_lmer_emmeans_richness.csv", row.names = F)
## Plot alpha diversity barplot binned by DOL 
richness_abx_dol <- ggplot(ps.filt.meta, aes(x = abx_group_names, y = Richness, fill = abx_group_names)) +
  geom_boxplot(outlier.shape=NA)+
  geom_jitter(width=0.2)+
  scale_fill_manual(values=custom_colors_names)+
  facet_wrap(~ DOL_bin, nrow = 2, strip.position = "top") +
  labs(
    x = "Antibiotic Exposure Group", 
    y = "Species Richness", 
    fill = "Antibiotic Exposure Group",
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 16, angle = 45, hjust = 1, color = "black"),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 16),
    axis.title.x = element_text(size = 18, face = "bold"),
    axis.title.y = element_text(size = 18, face = "bold"),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 16, face = "bold"),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 14),
    strip.text = element_text(size = 18, face = "bold"),  # Larger facet titles
    panel.spacing = unit(1.2, "lines"),
    panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA, linewidth = 0.8)
  )


richness_abx_dol_emm_lmer <- richness_abx_dol + stat_pvalue_manual(
  lmer_emmeans_richness,
  label = "p.adj.signif",   # can use "p.adj" for exact values
  tip.length = 0.01,
  step.increase = 0.05,
  hide.ns = TRUE, bracket.size = 0.6, facet.y = "bin"
)
ggsave("260202_P4_GM_Dev_Richness_abx_group_DOL_bp_emmeans.pdf", plot = richness_abx_dol_emm_lmer, bg = "transparent", width = 20, height = 10)


########### Shannon ##################
### Perform stat test and plot #######
lmer_emmeans_shannon <- perform_emmeans_lmer(df = ps.filt.meta, facet_var = "DOL_bin", x_var = "abx_group_names", y_var = "Shannon",
                                              fixed_effects = c("Gestational_age_weeks"),
                                              random_effects = c("(1|Patient)", "(1|Site)", "(1|Study)"),
                                              p.adjust.method = "BH",
                                              df_method = "kenward-roger")
write.csv(lmer_emmeans_shannon, "260202_lmer_emmeans_shannon.csv", row.names = F)

shannon_abx_dol <- ggplot(ps.filt.meta, aes(x = abx_group_names, y = Shannon, fill = abx_group_names)) +
  geom_boxplot(outlier.shape=NA)+
  geom_jitter(width=0.2)+
  scale_fill_manual(values=custom_colors_names)+
  facet_wrap(~ DOL_bin, nrow = 2, strip.position = "top") +
  labs(
    x = "Antibiotic Exposure Group", 
    y = "Shannon Diversity", 
    fill = "Antibiotic Exposure Group",
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 16, angle = 45, hjust = 1, color = "black"),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 16),
    axis.title.x = element_text(size = 18, face = "bold"),
    axis.title.y = element_text(size = 18, face = "bold"),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 16, face = "bold"),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 14),
    strip.text = element_text(size = 18, face = "bold"),  # Larger facet titles
    panel.spacing = unit(1.2, "lines"),
    panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA, linewidth = 0.8)
  )


shannon_abx_dol_emm_lmer <- shannon_abx_dol + stat_pvalue_manual(
  lmer_emmeans_shannon,
  label = "p.adj.signif",   # can use "p.adj" for exact values
  tip.length = 0.01,
  step.increase = 0.05,
  hide.ns = TRUE, bracket.size = 0.6, facet.y = "bin"
)
ggsave("260202_P4_GM_Dev_Shannon_abx_group_DOL_bp_emmeans.pdf", plot = shannon_abx_dol_emm_lmer, bg = "transparent", width = 20, height = 10)

###### Facet by abx group #######
lmer_emmeans_shannon_DOL <- perform_emmeans_lmer(df = ps.filt.meta, facet_var = "abx_group_names", x_var = "DOL_bin", y_var = "Shannon",
                                              fixed_effects = c("Gestational_age_weeks"),
                                              random_effects = c("(1|Patient)", "(1|Site)", "(1|Study)"),
                                              p.adjust.method = "BH",
                                              df_method = "kenward-roger")
write.csv(lmer_emmeans_shannon_DOL, "260202_lmer_emmeans_shannon_by_DOL.csv", row.names = F)

shannon_abx_dol2 <- ggplot(ps.filt.meta, aes(x = DOL_bin, y = Shannon, fill = abx_group_names)) +
  geom_boxplot(outlier.shape=NA)+
  geom_jitter(width=0.2)+
  scale_fill_manual(values=custom_colors_names)+
  facet_wrap(~ abx_group_names, nrow = 2, strip.position = "top") +
  labs(
    x = "DOL bin", 
    y = "Shannon Diversity", 
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 16, angle = 45, hjust = 1, color = "black"),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 16),
    axis.title.x = element_text(size = 18, face = "bold"),
    axis.title.y = element_text(size = 18, face = "bold"),
    legend.position = "none",
    strip.text = element_text(size = 18, face = "bold"),  # Larger facet titles
    panel.spacing = unit(1.2, "lines"),
    panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA, linewidth = 0.8)
  )
ggsave("260202_P4_GM_Dev_Shannon_abx_group_facet_DOL_bp.pdf", plot = shannon_abx_dol2, bg = "transparent", width = 20, height = 10)

lmer_emmeans_shannon_DOL <- lmer_emmeans_shannon_DOL %>% separate(contrast, into = c("group1", "group2"), sep = "\\) - \\(") %>%
  mutate(
    group1 = gsub("^\\(|\\)$", "", group1),
    group2 = gsub("^\\(|\\)$", "", group2)
  )

shannon_abx_dol2_emm_lmer <- shannon_abx_dol2 + stat_pvalue_manual(
  lmer_emmeans_shannon_DOL,
  label = "p.adj.signif",   # can use "p.adj" for exact values
  tip.length = 0.01,
  step.increase = 0.05,
  hide.ns = TRUE, bracket.size = 0.4, facet.y = "bin"
)
ggsave("260202_P4_GM_Dev_Shannon_abx_group_facet_DOL_bp_emmeans.pdf", plot = shannon_abx_dol2_emm_lmer, bg = "transparent", width = 20, height = 10)


lmer_emmeans_richness_DOL <- perform_emmeans_lmer(df = ps.filt.meta, facet_var = "abx_group_names", x_var = "DOL_bin", y_var = "Richness",
                                              fixed_effects = c("Gestational_age_weeks"),
                                              random_effects = c("(1|Patient)", "(1|Site)", "(1|Study)"),
                                              p.adjust.method = "BH",
                                              df_method = "kenward-roger")
write.csv(lmer_emmeans_richness_DOL, "260202_lmer_emmeans_richness_by_DOL.csv", row.names = F)

richness_abx_dol2 <- ggplot(ps.filt.meta, aes(x = DOL_bin, y = Richness, fill = abx_group_names)) +
  geom_boxplot(outlier.shape=NA)+
  geom_jitter(width=0.2)+
  scale_fill_manual(values=custom_colors_names)+
  facet_wrap(~ abx_group_names, nrow = 2, strip.position = "top") +
  labs(
    x = "DOL bin", 
    y = "Species Richness", 
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 16, angle = 45, hjust = 1, color = "black"),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 16),
    axis.title.x = element_text(size = 18, face = "bold"),
    axis.title.y = element_text(size = 18, face = "bold"),
    legend.position = "none",
    strip.text = element_text(size = 18, face = "bold"),  # Larger facet titles
    panel.spacing = unit(1.2, "lines"),
    panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA, linewidth = 0.8)
  )
ggsave("260202_P4_GM_Dev_Richness_abx_group_facet_DOL_bp.pdf", plot = richness_abx_dol2, bg = "transparent", width = 20, height = 10)

lmer_emmeans_richness_DOL <- lmer_emmeans_richness_DOL %>% separate(contrast, into = c("group1", "group2"), sep = "\\) - \\(") %>%
  mutate(
    group1 = gsub("^\\(|\\)$", "", group1),
    group2 = gsub("^\\(|\\)$", "", group2)
  )

richness_abx_dol2_emm_lmer <- richness_abx_dol2 + stat_pvalue_manual(
  lmer_emmeans_richness_DOL,
  label = "p.adj.signif",   # can use "p.adj" for exact values
  tip.length = 0.01,
  step.increase = 0.05,
  hide.ns = TRUE, bracket.size = 0.4, facet.y = "bin"
)
ggsave("260202_P4_GM_Dev_Richness_abx_group_facet_DOL_bp_emmeans.pdf", plot = richness_abx_dol2_emm_lmer, bg = "transparent", width = 20, height = 10)

###--- Run lmer and emmeans separately on term dataset ######
nterm_meta <- ps.filt.meta %>% filter(abx_group_names == "Near-term")
lmer_emmeans_richness_DOL_nterm <- perform_emmeans_lmer(df = nterm_meta, facet_var = "abx_group_names", x_var = "DOL_bin", y_var = "Richness",
                                              fixed_effects = c("Gestational_age_weeks"),
                                              random_effects = c("(1|Patient)"),
                                              p.adjust.method = "BH",
                                              df_method = "kenward-roger")
write.csv(lmer_emmeans_richness_DOL_nterm, "260203_lmer_emmeans_richness_by_DOL_nterm.csv", row.names = F)

lmer_emmeans_shannon_DOL_nterm <- perform_emmeans_lmer(df = nterm_meta, facet_var = "abx_group_names", x_var = "DOL_bin", y_var = "Shannon",
                                              fixed_effects = c("Gestational_age_weeks"),
                                              random_effects = c("(1|Patient)"),
                                              p.adjust.method = "BH",
                                              df_method = "kenward-roger")
write.csv(lmer_emmeans_shannon_DOL_nterm, "260203_lmer_emmeans_shannon_by_DOL_nterm.csv", row.names = F)

```

ARG Comparison 
```{r}
#look at overall ARG burden between groups
##load shortbred output
arg.full <- as.data.frame(read.delim("~/Library/CloudStorage/Box-Box/pppp/GM_development_cohort/Shortbred/250905_P4_GM_Dev_ShortBRED_merged_output_n2585.txt"))
arg.full <- arg.full %>% mutate(Sample_ID_R_final = gsub("-", ".", paste0("p4_", Sample)))
arg.p4 <- as.data.frame(read.delim("~/Library/CloudStorage/Box-Box/pppp/GM_development_cohort/Shortbred/251022_GM_Dev_P4_shortBRED_joint_output.txt"))
arg.p4 <- arg.p4 %>% mutate(Sample_ID_R_final = paste0("p4_", gsub("_", ".", Sample)))
arg_df <- rbind(arg.full, arg.p4)

# starts_with_number <- grepl("^[0-9]", arg.full$Sample)
# modified_column <- arg.full$Sample
# modified_column[starts_with_number] <- paste0("p4_", gsub("-", ".", arg.full$Sample[starts_with_number]))
# arg.full$Sample_ID_R_final <- modified_column

arg.wide <- as.data.frame(dcast(arg_df, Sample_ID_R_final ~ Family, value.var = 'Count', fun.aggregate = sum))
row.names(arg.wide) <- arg.wide$Sample_ID_R_final
arg.wide <- arg.wide[, c(-1)]

##sum counts to get RPKM per sample
arg.wide$RPKM <- rowSums(arg.wide)

##get ARG richness
arg.wide$Richness <- specnumber(arg.wide[, 1:ncol(arg.wide)-1])

# Merge arg.wide to metadata 
## First add a paperID column to merge with metadata file
arg.wide$Sample_ID_R_final <- row.names(arg.wide)
# Subset arg.wide to columns we want
arg.want <- arg.wide %>%
  select(c(Sample_ID_R_final, RPKM, Richness)) %>% dplyr::rename(ShortBRED_richness = Richness)

# Merge with metadata
arg.df <- merge(ps_infants_meta, arg.want, by = "Sample_ID_R_final")

arg.df <- arg.df %>% filter(abx_group_updated != "After only") 

##### Read in term ARG data ######
arg_term <- as.data.frame(read.delim("~/Library/CloudStorage/Box-Box/pppp/GM_development_cohort/Shortbred/251016_DrewG_term_n162_shortbred_merged.txt"))

arg_term_wide <- as.data.frame(dcast(arg_term, Sample ~ Family, value.var = 'Count', fun.aggregate = sum))
row.names(arg_term_wide) <- arg_term_wide$Sample
arg_term_wide <- arg_term_wide[, c(-1)]

##sum counts to get RPKM per sample
arg_term_wide$RPKM <- rowSums(arg_term_wide)

##get ARG richness
arg_term_wide$Richness <- specnumber(arg_term_wide[, 1:ncol(arg_term_wide)-1])

# Merge arg.wide to metadata 
## First add a paperID column to merge with metadata file
arg_term_wide$Sample <- row.names(arg_term_wide)
# Subset arg.wide to columns we want
arg_term_want <- arg_term_wide %>%
  select(c(Sample, RPKM, Richness)) %>% dplyr::rename(Sample_ID_R_final = Sample, ShortBRED_richness = Richness)

# Merge with metadata
term_arg.df <- merge(ps_infants_meta, arg_term_want, by = "Sample_ID_R_final") 

#### Merge with preterm ARG data ###
arg.df2 <- arg.df %>% 
  select(Sample_ID_R_final, Patient, Study, Site, DOL_bin, Gestational_age_weeks, abx_group_updated, abx_group_names, RPKM, ShortBRED_richness)
term_arg.df2 <- term_arg.df %>% select(Sample_ID_R_final, Patient, Study, Site, DOL_bin, Gestational_age_weeks, abx_group_updated, abx_group_names, RPKM, ShortBRED_richness)

arg_full <- rbind(arg.df2, term_arg.df2)
write.csv(arg_full, "260130_P4_GM_Dev_ARG_data.csv", row.names = F)


###### Plot and compare using linear mixed models ###########
lmer_emmeans_arg_rpkm <- perform_emmeans_lmer(df = arg_full, facet_var = "DOL_bin", x_var = "abx_group_names", y_var = "RPKM",
                                              fixed_effects = c("Gestational_age_weeks"),
                                              random_effects = c("(1|Patient)", "(1|Site)", "(1|Study)"),
                                              p.adjust.method = "BH",
                                              df_method = "kenward-roger")
write.csv(lmer_emmeans_arg_rpkm, "260202_lmer_emmeans_ARG_rpkm.csv", row.names = F)

counts_by_bin <- arg_full %>%
  filter(!is.na(RPKM), !is.na(abx_group_names)) %>%
  mutate(abx_group_names = droplevels(abx_group_names)) %>%
  count(DOL_bin, abx_group_names, name = "n") %>%
  group_by(DOL_bin) %>% mutate(groups_present = n_distinct(abx_group_names)) %>% ungroup()
write.csv(counts_by_bin, "260202_abx_exposure_n_by_group_shortbred_comparison.csv", row.names = F)

shortbred_hits_rpkm <- ggplot(arg_full, aes(x = abx_group_names, y = RPKM, fill = abx_group_names)) +
  geom_boxplot(outlier.shape=NA)+
  geom_jitter(shape = 17, aes(fill = abx_group_names), color = "black", width=0.2, size = 2, alpha = 0.4)+
  scale_fill_manual(values=custom_colors_names)+
  scale_color_manual(values=custom_colors_names) +
  facet_wrap(~ DOL_bin, nrow = 2, strip.position = "top") +
  labs(
    x = "Antibiotic Exposure Group", 
    y = "Total ShortBRED hits (RPKM)", 
    fill = "Antibiotic Exposure Group",
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 16, angle = 45, hjust = 1, color = "black"),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 16),
    axis.title.x = element_text(size = 18, face = "bold"),
    axis.title.y = element_text(size = 18, face = "bold"),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 16, face = "bold"),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 14),
    strip.text = element_text(size = 18, face = "bold"),  # Larger facet titles
    panel.spacing = unit(1.2, "lines"),
    panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA, linewidth = 0.8)
  )

shortbred_hits_rpkm_stat  <- shortbred_hits_rpkm + stat_pvalue_manual(
  lmer_emmeans_arg_rpkm,
  label = "p.adj.signif",   # can use "p.adj" for exact values
  tip.length = 0.01,
  step.increase = 0.05,
  hide.ns = TRUE, bracket.size = 0.6, facet.y = "bin"
)
ggsave("260202_P4_GM_Dev_ARG_RPKM_abx_group_DOL_bp_emmeans.pdf", plot = shortbred_hits_rpkm_stat, bg = "transparent", width = 20, height = 10)

########### Total ShortBRED Hits (Richness) #########
lmer_emmeans_arg_richness <- perform_emmeans_lmer(df = arg_full, facet_var = "DOL_bin", x_var = "abx_group_names", y_var = "ShortBRED_richness",
                                              fixed_effects = c("Gestational_age_weeks"),
                                              random_effects = c("(1|Patient)", "(1|Site)", "(1|Study)"),
                                              p.adjust.method = "BH",
                                              df_method = "kenward-roger")
write.csv(lmer_emmeans_arg_richness, "260202_lmer_emmeans_ARG_richness.csv", row.names = F)

shortbred_hits_richness <- ggplot(arg_full, aes(x = abx_group_names, y = ShortBRED_richness, fill = abx_group_names)) +
  geom_boxplot(outlier.shape=NA)+
  geom_jitter(shape = 17, aes(fill = abx_group_names), color = "black", width=0.2, size = 2, alpha = 0.4)+
  scale_fill_manual(values=custom_colors_names)+
  scale_color_manual(values=custom_colors_names) +
  facet_wrap(~ DOL_bin, nrow = 2, strip.position = "top") +
  labs(
    x = "Antibiotic Exposure Group", 
    y = "Total ShortBRED hits (Unique ARGs)", 
    fill = "Antibiotic Exposure Group",
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 16, angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 16),
    axis.title.x = element_text(size = 18, face = "bold"),
    axis.title.y = element_text(size = 18, face = "bold"),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 16, face = "bold"),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 14),
    strip.text = element_text(size = 18, face = "bold"),  # Larger facet titles
    panel.spacing = unit(1.2, "lines"),
    panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA, linewidth = 0.8)
  )

shortbred_hits_richness_stat <- shortbred_hits_richness + stat_pvalue_manual(
  lmer_emmeans_arg_richness,
  label = "p.adj.signif",   # can use "p.adj" for exact values
  tip.length = 0.01,
  step.increase = 0.05,
  hide.ns = TRUE, bracket.size = 0.6, facet.y = "bin"
)
ggsave("260202_P4_GM_Dev_ARG_Richness_abx_group_DOL_bp_emmeans.pdf", plot = shortbred_hits_richness_stat, bg = "transparent", width = 20, height = 10)

###################-------------Richness normalized ARGs------------#######################
### Merge ARG data with phyloseq metadata ###
arg_full_want <- arg_full %>% select(Sample_ID_R_final, RPKM, ShortBRED_richness) %>% 
  dplyr::rename(ShortBRED_RPKM = RPKM)
ps.filt.meta2 <- merge(ps.filt.meta, arg_full_want, by = "Sample_ID_R_final")

ps.filt.meta2$norm_arg_abund <- ps.filt.meta2$ShortBRED_RPKM / ps.filt.meta2$Richness
#write.csv(ps.filt.meta2, "260202_P4_GM_Dev_all_infants_meta_alpha_ARGs.csv", row.names = F)

lmer_emmeans_norm_arg_richness <- perform_emmeans_lmer(df = ps.filt.meta2, facet_var = "DOL_bin", x_var = "abx_group_names", y_var = "norm_arg_abund",
                                              fixed_effects = c("Gestational_age_weeks"),
                                              random_effects = c("(1|Patient)", "(1|Site)", "(1|Study)"),
                                              p.adjust.method = "BH",
                                              df_method = "kenward-roger")
write.csv(lmer_emmeans_norm_arg_richness, "260206_lmer_emmeans_richness_norm_ARG_rpkm.csv", row.names = F)

norm_arg_abund <- ggplot(ps.filt.meta2, aes(x = abx_group_names, y = norm_arg_abund, fill = abx_group_names)) +
  geom_boxplot(outlier.shape=NA)+
  geom_jitter(shape = 17, aes(fill = abx_group_names), color = "black", width=0.2, size = 2, alpha = 0.4)+
  scale_fill_manual(values=custom_colors_names)+
  scale_color_manual(values=custom_colors_names) +
  facet_wrap(~ DOL_bin, nrow = 2, strip.position = "top") +
  labs(
    x = "Antibiotic Exposure Group", 
    y = "Richness Normalized Total ShortBRED Hits (RPKM)", 
    fill = "Antibiotic Exposure Group",
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 16, angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 16),
    axis.title.x = element_text(size = 18, face = "bold"),
    axis.title.y = element_text(size = 18, face = "bold"),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 16, face = "bold"),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 14),
    strip.text = element_text(size = 18, face = "bold"),  # Larger facet titles
    panel.spacing = unit(1.2, "lines"),
    panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA, linewidth = 0.8)
  )
ggsave("260206_P4_GM_Dev_Richness_Norm_ARG_rpkm_abx_group_.pdf", plot = norm_arg_abund, bg = "transparent", width = 20, height = 10)

norm_arg_abund_stat <- norm_arg_abund + stat_pvalue_manual(
  lmer_emmeans_norm_arg_richness,
  label = "p.adj.signif",   # can use "p.adj" for exact values
  tip.length = 0.01,
  step.increase = 0.05,
  hide.ns = TRUE, bracket.size = 0.6, facet.y = "bin"
)

```


## Beta diversity comparisons
```{r}
######## Plot ordination plot #####
gm_dev_ordination <- phyloseq::ordinate(merged_ps, method='PCoA', distance='bray')

pcoa_gm_dev <- phyloseq::plot_ordination(merged_ps, gm_dev_ordination,
                                         type="samples", color= "DOL_bin")+
  geom_point(shape=19, size=3)+
  #scale_color_manual(values = dol_bin_color_vector) + 
  scale_color_manual(values=natparks.pals("Arches"))+ 
  theme_classic()+
  theme(axis.text.y = element_text(size=20),
        axis.text.x = element_text(size=20),
        axis.title.x = element_text(size=20),
        axis.title.y = element_text(size=20),
        legend.title = element_text(size = 18),
        legend.text = element_text(size=16),
        legend.position = 'left',
        plot.title = element_text(size=15),
        panel.border = element_rect(fill=NA, colour="black", size=3))

pcoa_gm_dev <- ggMarginal(pcoa_gm_dev, type='boxplot', groupFill=TRUE, size=10)
ggsave("260202_GM_Dev_PCoA_DOL_bin_P4_joined.pdf", plot = pcoa_gm_dev, bg = "transparent", width = 9, height = 6)

pcoa_gm_dev_abx <- phyloseq::plot_ordination(merged_ps, gm_dev_ordination,
                                             type="samples", color= "abx_group_updated")+
  geom_point(shape=19, size=3)+
  stat_ellipse()+
  scale_color_manual(values = custom_colors_abx) + 
  theme_classic()+
  theme(axis.text.y = element_text(size=20),
        axis.text.x = element_text(size=20),
        axis.title.x = element_text(size=20),
        axis.title.y = element_text(size=20),
        legend.title = element_text(size = 18),
        legend.text = element_text(size=16),
        legend.position = 'left',
        plot.title = element_text(size=15),
        panel.border = element_rect(fill=NA, colour="black", size=3))

pcoa_gm_dev_abx <- ggMarginal(pcoa_gm_dev_abx, type='boxplot', groupFill=TRUE, size=10)
ggsave("260202_GM_Dev_PCoA_abx_exposure_group_P4_joined.pdf", plot = pcoa_gm_dev_abx, bg = "transparent", width = 9, height = 6)

pcoa_gm_dev_abx_count <- phyloseq::plot_ordination(merged_ps, gm_dev_ordination,
                                             type="samples", color= "abx_exposure_count")+
  geom_point(shape=19, size=3)+
  scale_color_gradientn(colors = natparks.pals("Arches")) + 
  theme_classic()+
  theme(axis.text.y = element_text(size=20),
        axis.text.x = element_text(size=20),
        axis.title.x = element_text(size=20),
        axis.title.y = element_text(size=20),
        legend.title = element_text(size = 16),
        legend.text = element_text(size=14),
        legend.position = 'left',
        plot.title = element_text(size=15),
        panel.border = element_rect(fill=NA, colour="black", size=3))
ggsave("260202_GM_Dev_PCoA_abx_exposure_count_P4_joined.pdf", plot = pcoa_gm_dev_abx_count, bg = "transparent", width = 9, height = 6)


### Including term infants #####
gm_dev_ordination2 <- phyloseq::ordinate(ps_infants, method='PCoA', distance='bray')

pcoa_gm_dev_abx_term <- phyloseq::plot_ordination(ps_infants, gm_dev_ordination2,
                                             type="samples", color= "abx_group_names")+
  geom_point(shape=19, size=3)+
  stat_ellipse()+
  scale_color_manual(values = custom_colors_names) + 
  theme_classic()+
  theme(axis.text.y = element_text(size=20),
        axis.text.x = element_text(size=20),
        axis.title.x = element_text(size=20),
        axis.title.y = element_text(size=20),
        legend.title = element_text(size = 18),
        legend.text = element_text(size=16),
        legend.position = 'left',
        plot.title = element_text(size=15),
        panel.border = element_rect(fill=NA, colour="black", size=3))

pcoa_gm_dev_abx_term <- ggMarginal(pcoa_gm_dev_abx_term, type='boxplot', groupFill=TRUE, size=10)
ggsave("260202_GM_Dev_PCoA_abx_exposure_group_tern_joined.pdf", plot = pcoa_gm_dev_abx_term, bg = "transparent", width = 9, height = 6)


## Pairwise comparisons by DOL bin ##
group_levels <- levels(factor(ps_infants_meta$abx_group_names))
group_pairs <- combn(group_levels, 2, simplify = FALSE)

# Loop through each pair
for (pair in group_pairs) {
  # Subset the phyloseq object
  print(pair)
  ps_subset <- subset_samples(ps_infants, abx_group_names %in% pair)
  ps_subset <- prune_samples(sample_sums(ps_subset) > 0, ps_subset)  # avoid empty samples
  ps_subset
  
  # Perform ordination
  ord <- ordinate(ps_subset, method = "PCoA", distance = "bray")
  
  # Base PCoA plot
  p <- plot_ordination(ps_subset, ord, type = "samples", color = "abx_group_names") +
    geom_point(shape = 19, size = 3) +
    stat_ellipse() +
    scale_color_manual(values = custom_colors_names[pair]) +
    theme_classic() +
    theme(
      axis.text = element_text(size = 14),
      axis.title = element_text(size = 16),
      legend.title = element_text(size = 14),
      legend.text = element_text(size = 12),
      legend.position = "left",
      plot.title = element_text(size = 16, hjust = 0.5),
      panel.border = element_rect(fill = NA, colour = "black", size = 1)
    ) +
    labs(title = paste(pair[1], "vs", pair[2]))
  
  # Add marginal boxplots
  p_with_marginals <- ggMarginal(p, type = "boxplot", groupFill = TRUE, size = 10)
  
  # Save the plot
  file_name <- paste0("PCoA_", pair[1], "_vs_", pair[2], ".pdf")
  ggsave(file.path(file_name), plot = p_with_marginals, bg = "transparent", width = 9, height = 6)
  
  message("Saved: ", file_name)
}


ps_infants1 <- ps_infants %>% subset_samples(DOL_bin == "DOL 1 - 10")
plot_pcoa(ps_obj = ps_infants1, group_var = "abx_group_names", custom_colors = custom_colors_names, 
          adonisformula = "ps.dist ~ Gestational_age_weeks + Site + abx_group_names")

ps_infants2 <- ps_infants %>% subset_samples(DOL_bin == "DOL 11 - 20")
plot_pcoa(ps_obj = ps_infants2, group_var = "abx_group_names", custom_colors = custom_colors_names,
          adonisformula = "ps.dist ~ Gestational_age_weeks + Site + abx_group_names")

ps_infants3 <- ps_infants %>% subset_samples(DOL_bin == "DOL 21 - 30")
plot_pcoa(ps_obj = ps_infants3, group_var = "abx_group_names", custom_colors = custom_colors_names,
          adonisformula = "ps.dist ~ Gestational_age_weeks + Site + abx_group_names")

ps_infants4 <- ps_infants %>% subset_samples(DOL_bin == "DOL 31 - 40")
plot_pcoa(ps_obj = ps_infants4, group_var = "abx_group_names", custom_colors = custom_colors_names,
          adonisformula = "ps.dist ~ Gestational_age_weeks + Site + abx_group_names")

ps_infants5 <- ps_infants %>% subset_samples(DOL_bin == "DOL 41 - 50")
plot_pcoa(ps_obj = ps_infants5, group_var = "abx_group_names", custom_colors = custom_colors_names,
          adonisformula = "ps.dist ~ Gestational_age_weeks + Site + abx_group_names")

ps_infants6 <- ps_infants %>% subset_samples(DOL_bin == "DOL 51 - 60")
plot_pcoa(ps_obj = ps_infants6, group_var = "abx_group_names", custom_colors = custom_colors_names,
          adonisformula = "ps.dist ~ Gestational_age_weeks + Site + abx_group_names")


```

Repeat Measure PERMANOVA Summary Figure
```{r}
DOL <- c("DOL")
baseline_var <- c('Gestational_age_weeks',	'Birthweight','Sex',	'Delivery_route',	'Cohort', 'Necrotizing_enterocolitis', 'Site')
diet_var <- c('cum_days_formula', 'cum_days_milk', 'frac_days_formula','frac_days_milk')
mat_var <- c('Maternal_race','Maternal_age_at_delivery',	'Gravida',	'Para',	'Maternal_smoking',	'Maternal_alcohol',	'Maternal_substance_abuse',	'Maternal_preeclampsia',
'Maternal_diabetes',	'Maternal_chorioamnionitis', 'Maternal_hypertension', 'mat_inpt_antimicrobe',	'mat_outpt_antimicrobial',	'Multiple_births')
abx_var <- c('abx_group_updated','abx_exposure_count','aminoglycoside_exposure',	'penicillin_exposure',	'macrolide_exposure',	'firstgencephalosporin_exposure',	
'fourthgencephalosporin_exposure',	'thirdgencephalosporin_exposure',	'secondgencephalosporin_exposure','lincosamide_exposure',		'carbapenem_exposure',
	'other_antimicrobials_exposure', 'glycopeptide_exposure','acute_abx_exposure_count', 'acute_aminoglycoside_exposure', 'acute_penicillin_exposure','acute_macrolide_exposure', 'acute_firstgencephalosporin_exposure','acute_fourthgencephalosporin_exposure',
'acute_thirdgencephalosporin_exposure','acute_secondgencephalosporin_exposure','acute_lincosamide_exposure','acute_carbapenem_exposure','acute_other_antimicrobials_exposure',
'acute_other_non_antimicrobials_exposure','acute_glycopeptide_exposure')
medications_var <- c('med_exposure_count', 'other_non_antimicrobials_exposure',
	'morphine_exposure',	'fentanyl_exposure',	'surfactant_exposure',	'acetaminophen_exposure',	'caffeine_exposure',	'cholecalciferol_vit_d__exposure',	'vitamin_a_exposure',	
  'famotidine_pepcid__exposure',	'iron_exposure',	'calcium_gluconate_exposure',	'dopamine_exposure',	'adenosine_exposure',	'cosyntropin_cortrosyn_acth__exposure',	
  'bumetanide_bumax__exposure',	'indomethacin_exposure',	'multi_vitamin_with_iron_exposure',	'lasix_exposure',	'atropine_exposure',	'dobutamine_exposure',	'sodium_chloride_exposure',	
  'levothyroxine_exposure',	'dexamethasone_exposure',	'phenobarbitol_exposure',	'hydrocortisone_exposure',	'ibuprofen_exposure',	'chlorathiazide_diuril__exposure',	'midazolam_versed__exposure',	
  'potassium_chloride_exposure',	'hepatitis_b_immune_globulin_exposure',	'citric_acid_sodium_citrate_bicitra__exposure',	'pancuronium_or_vecurionium_exposure',	'insulin_exposure',	
  'immunoglobulin_other_exposure',	'multi_vitamin_no_iron_exposure',	'levocarnitine_exposure',	'digoxin_exposure',	'hydraluronidase_hydase__exposure',	'lorazapam_ativan__exposure',	
  'sodium_bicarbonate_exposure',	'hydrochlorathiazide_hydrodiuril__exposure',	'spironolactone_hydrochlorathiazide_aldactazide__exposure',	'tocopherol_acetate_vit_e__exposure', 'antifungal_exposure', 'acute_med_exposure_count','acute_morphine_exposure','acute_fentanyl_exposure','acute_surfactant_exposure',
'acute_acetaminophen_exposure','acute_caffeine_exposure','acute_cholecalciferol_vit_d__exposure',
'acute_vitamin_a_exposure','acute_famotidine_pepcid__exposure','acute_iron_exposure',
'acute_calcium_gluconate_exposure','acute_dopamine_exposure','acute_bumetanide_bumax__exposure',
'acute_other_exposure','acute_indomethacin_exposure','acute_multi_vitamin_with_iron_exposure',
'acute_lasix_exposure','acute_atropine_exposure','acute_dobutamine_exposure',
'acute_sodium_chloride_exposure','acute_levothyroxine_exposure','acute_dexamethasone_exposure',
'acute_phenobarbitol_exposure','acute_hydrocortisone_exposure','acute_ibuprofen_exposure',
'acute_chlorathiazide_diuril__exposure','acute_midazolam_versed__exposure',
'acute_potassium_chloride_exposure','acute_citric_acid_sodium_citrate_bicitra__exposure',
'acute_pancuronium_or_vecurionium_exposure','acute_insulin_exposure', "acute_multi_vitamin_no_iron_exposure", "acute_levocarnitine_exposure", "acute_digoxin_exposure", "acute_lorazapam_ativan__exposure", "acute_sodium_bicarbonate_exposure",
'acute_antifungal_exposure', 'acute_antiviral_exposure', 'antiviral_exposure')

results <- read_excel("~/Library/CloudStorage/Box-Box/pppp/GM_development_cohort/Analyses/Manuscript/No_AfterOnly/Re-grouped/Beta_diversity/260203_GM_Dev_repeat_permanova_results_combined.xlsx")
results$p_adj_BH_redo <- p.adjust(results[["Pr(>F)"]], method = "BH")
results$p_adj_BH_redo <- as.numeric(results$p_adj_BH_redo)
write.csv(results, "260209_Repeat_measures_PERMANOVA_results_p_adj_redo.csv", row.names = F)

results <- results %>%
  mutate(significant = p_adj_BH_redo < 0.05,
         Category = case_when(Variable %in% DOL ~ "DOL",
                              Variable %in% baseline_var ~ "Baseline",
                              Variable %in% diet_var ~ "Diet",
                              Variable %in% mat_var ~ "Maternal",
                              Variable %in% abx_var ~ "Antibiotic",
                              Variable %in% medications_var ~ "Non-antibiotic medication"))
var_order <- c("DOL","Baseline", "Diet", "Maternal","Antibiotic", "Non-antibiotic medication")

results$Category <- factor(results$Category, levels = var_order)

results_plot <- results %>% mutate(R2_percent = R2 * 100,
                                   sig_label = case_when(p_adj_BH_redo <= 0.001 ~ "***",
                                                         p_adj_BH_redo <= 0.01 ~ "**",
                                                         p_adj_BH_redo <= 0.05 ~ "*")) %>%
  filter(p_adj_BH_redo < 0.05) %>%
  arrange(desc(R2_percent)) %>%
  mutate(Label = factor(Label, levels = unique(Label))) %>%
  ungroup()

perm_cat_vector = c("DOL" = "#3A1F46","Baseline" = "#7F4B89", "Diet" = "#F3DAE4", "Antibiotic" = "#E3A5D6", "Non-antibiotic medication" = "#7C5467")

permanova_sign_var_p <- ggplot(results_plot, aes(x = Label, y = R2_percent, fill = Category)) +
  geom_col(width = 0.8, color = "black") + 
  geom_text(aes(label = sig_label, y = R2_percent + 0.15), size = 5, vjust = 0) +
  scale_fill_manual(values=perm_cat_vector) + 
  labs(x = NULL, y = "Variance explained (%)", fill = NULL) + 
  scale_y_continuous(expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.1))) + 
  theme_classic(base_size = 14) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    legend.position = "right",
    axis.line.x = element_line(color = "black", linewidth = 0.6),
    axis.ticks.x = element_line(color = "black", linewidth = 0.4),
    plot.margin = ggplot2::margin(t = 10, r = 10, b = 40, l = 10))  # extra space for category bar
ggsave("260205_GM_Dev_repeat_measure_PERMANOVA_sign_var_acute_combined.pdf", plot = permanova_sign_var_p, bg = "transparent", width = 12, height = 6)
```


Run Linear Mixed Models (MaAslin2) to test association between species and metadata
```{r}
############### ----------------------------- Taxa ----------------------##################################################

repeat_permanova_sign_var <- results_plot$Variable

pterm_infants_otu <- data.frame(otu_table(merged_ps), check.names = FALSE) 
pterm_infants_meta <- data.frame(sample_data(merged_ps), check.names = FALSE)

pterm_infants_meta <- pterm_infants_meta %>% mutate(Study = case_when(Cohort == "BSI" ~ "Schwartz_et_al",
                                                                  Cohort == "Gasparrini_preterm" ~ "Gasparrini_et_al",
                                                                  Cohort == "Gasparrini_term" ~ "Gasparrini_et_al",
                                                                  Cohort == "Molly" ~ "Gibson_et_al",
                                                                  Cohort == "NEC_control" ~ "Thanert_et_al",
                                                                  Cohort == "No_abx_preterm" ~ "This_study",
                                                                  Cohort == "P4_cross_sectional" ~ "This_study"))

cat_var <- c("Patient",'Sex','Delivery_route', 'Necrotizing_enterocolitis', 'Site','Maternal_substance_abuse','Maternal_preeclampsia','Maternal_diabetes', 'Maternal_chorioamnionitis', 'Maternal_hypertension','mat_inpt_antimicrobe', 'mat_outpt_antimicrobial','Multiple_births','Cohort', 'Site', 'abx_group_updated',
             'abx_group_names', 'Study')

num_var <- c('Gestational_age_weeks', 'Birthweight','DOL','abx_exposure_count', 'antiviral_exposure', 'antiviral_exposure',	'aminoglycoside_exposure',	
'penicillin_exposure',	'macrolide_exposure',	'firstgencephalosporin_exposure',	'fourthgencephalosporin_exposure',	'thirdgencephalosporin_exposure',	'secondgencephalosporin_exposure',	
'lincosamide_exposure',	'antifungal_exposure',	'carbapenem_exposure',	'other_antimicrobials_exposure',	'other_non_antimicrobials_exposure','glycopeptide_exposure', 'med_exposure_count',
	'morphine_exposure',	'fentanyl_exposure',	'surfactant_exposure',	'acetaminophen_exposure',	'caffeine_exposure',	'cholecalciferol_vit_d__exposure',	'vitamin_a_exposure',	
  'famotidine_pepcid__exposure',	'iron_exposure',	'calcium_gluconate_exposure',	'dopamine_exposure',	'adenosine_exposure',	'cosyntropin_cortrosyn_acth__exposure',	
  'bumetanide_bumax__exposure',	'indomethacin_exposure',	'multi_vitamin_with_iron_exposure',	'lasix_exposure',	'atropine_exposure',	'dobutamine_exposure',	'sodium_chloride_exposure',	
  'levothyroxine_exposure',	'dexamethasone_exposure',	'phenobarbitol_exposure',	'hydrocortisone_exposure',	'ibuprofen_exposure',	'chlorathiazide_diuril__exposure',	'midazolam_versed__exposure',	
  'potassium_chloride_exposure',	'hepatitis_b_immune_globulin_exposure',	'citric_acid_sodium_citrate_bicitra__exposure',	'pancuronium_or_vecurionium_exposure',	'insulin_exposure',	
  'immunoglobulin_other_exposure',	'multi_vitamin_no_iron_exposure',	'levocarnitine_exposure',	'digoxin_exposure',	'hydraluronidase_hydase__exposure',	'lorazapam_ativan__exposure',	
  'sodium_bicarbonate_exposure',	'hydrochlorathiazide_hydrodiuril__exposure',	'spironolactone_hydrochlorathiazide_aldactazide__exposure',	'tocopherol_acetate_vit_e__exposure', 
  'cum_days_formula', 'cum_days_milk', 'frac_days_formula','frac_days_milk', "acute_fentanyl_exposure", "acute_cholecalciferol_vit_d__exposure", "acute_dopamine_exposure", "acute_levothyroxine_exposure", "acute_hydrocortisone_exposure", "acute_insulin_exposure", "acute_surfactant_exposure", "acute_iron_exposure", "acute_indomethacin_exposure", "acute_dexamethasone_exposure",
"acute_citric_acid_sodium_citrate_bicitra__exposure", "acute_lorazapam_ativan__exposure", )

pterm_infants_meta <- pterm_infants_meta %>%
  mutate(across(all_of(intersect(cat_var, names(.))), as.factor)) %>%
  mutate(across(all_of(intersect(results_plot$Variable, names(.))), as.numeric))

pterm_infants_meta$abx_group_updated <- factor(pterm_infants_meta$abx_group_updated, levels = c("None", "Early only", "Early and after"))

maaslin_taxa_results <- Maaslin2(input_data = pterm_infants_otu,
                                input_metadata = pterm_infants_meta,
                                transform = "LOG",
                                normalization = "NONE",
                                min_abundance = 0.0001,
                                min_prevalence = 0.1,
                                output = "~/Library/CloudStorage/Box-Box/pppp/GM_development_cohort/Analyses/Manuscript/No_AfterOnly/Re-grouped/MaAslin2/Taxa/all_sign_var",
                                fixed_effects = c("abx_group_updated",repeat_permanova_sign_var),
                                random_effects = c("Patient", "Site", "Study"))

############ --------------- Coefficient Plots ------------------------------#############################################
taxa_sign_out <- read_excel("~/Library/CloudStorage/Box-Box/pppp/GM_development_cohort/Analyses/Manuscript/No_AfterOnly/Re-grouped/MaAslin2/Taxa/all_sign_var/significant_results.xlsx")

num_samples <- 2406

taxa_sign_out_filt <- taxa_sign_out %>%
  filter(qval < 0.05) %>%
  mutate(
    # grab text AFTER "g__" up to the next dot
    genus  = str_extract(feature, "(?<=g__)[^.]+"),
    genus  = if_else(is.na(genus) | genus == "", "Unknown", genus),
    value  = as.factor(value),
    feature = gsub(".*s__", "", feature)
  )
write.csv(taxa_sign_out_filt, "260205_MaAslin2_all_sign_var_results.csv", row.names = F)

unique_taxa <- unique(taxa_sign_out_filt$feature)
unique_genera <- unique(taxa_sign_out_filt$genus)

maaslin_taxa_abxGroup <- taxa_sign_out %>% filter(metadata == "abx_group_updated") %>% 
  #filter(qval < 0.05) %>%
  mutate(
    # grab text AFTER "g__" up to the next dot
    genus  = str_extract(feature, "(?<=g__)[^.]+"),
    genus  = if_else(is.na(genus) | genus == "", "Unknown", genus),
    value  = as.factor(value),
    feature = gsub(".*s__", "", feature)
  ) %>%
  arrange(desc(coef))

#obtain min and max coefficient values (needed for plotting later)
min <- min(maaslin_taxa_abxGroup$coef)
max <- max(maaslin_taxa_abxGroup$coef)

### Generate coefficient plot ####
# Calculate 95% CI for coefficients
maaslin_taxa_abxGroup <- maaslin_taxa_abxGroup %>% mutate(species = fct_reorder(feature, coef))

maaslin_taxa_abxGroup$coefmax <- maaslin_taxa_abxGroup$coef + maaslin_taxa_abxGroup$stderr
maaslin_taxa_abxGroup$coefmin <- maaslin_taxa_abxGroup$coef - maaslin_taxa_abxGroup$stderr

maaslin_taxa_abxGroup$CI95upper <- maaslin_taxa_abxGroup$coef + 1.96*maaslin_taxa_abxGroup$stderr
maaslin_taxa_abxGroup$CI95lower <- maaslin_taxa_abxGroup$coef - 1.96*maaslin_taxa_abxGroup$stderr

maaslin_taxa_abxGroup$value <- factor(maaslin_taxa_abxGroup$value, levels = c("Early only", "Early and after"))
write.csv(maaslin_taxa_abxGroup, "260205_MaAslin2_sign_taxa_abx_group.csv", row.names = F)

# Plot coefficients
x_min_lim <- (floor(min / 5) * 6) 
x_max_lim <- (ceiling(max / 5) * 6) 
colors_list <- c("#44637D","#AAC9ED")

abxgroup_coeff_p <- ggplot(maaslin_taxa_abxGroup, aes(x=coef, y=species,color=value))+
  geom_point(size = 3)+
  geom_errorbarh(aes(xmax = CI95upper, xmin = CI95lower, height =0.1))+
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype='dotted', color='grey', size=1.5)+
  scale_color_manual(values=colors_list)+
  theme_linedraw()+
  theme(axis.text.y = element_text(size=18),
        axis.text.x = element_text(size=17),
        axis.title.x = element_text(size=17),
        axis.title.y = element_blank(),
        legend.text = element_text(size = 16),
        legend.position = "bottom",
        plot.title = element_text(size=15),
        panel.border = element_rect(fill=NA, colour="black", size=1))+
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = scales::pretty_breaks(n = 10)) +
  xlab('Coefficient') + ggtitle("Antibiotic Exposure Group")
ggsave("260205_GM_dev_abx_group_MaAslin2_taxa_coeff.pdf", plot = abxgroup_coeff_p, bg = "transparent", width = 11, height = 12)

#### Generate prevalence plot ###
### Access species abundance data 
abund_gmdev <- psmelt(merged_ps)

abund_gmdev <- abund_gmdev %>%  mutate(
    genus = str_extract(OTU, "g__[^|]+"),  # extract 'g__Genus'
    genus = str_remove(genus, "g__"),          # remove 'g__' prefix
    genus = if_else(is.na(genus), "Unknown", genus),
    OTU=gsub(".*s__", "", OTU))

abund_abx_group <- subset(abund_gmdev, OTU %in% maaslin_taxa_abxGroup$feature)

# Re-order feature abs abundances according to coefficient value
# This order is preserved in filename, which was previously ordered: 
order_abx_group <- data.frame(OTU = unique(maaslin_taxa_abxGroup$feature))
# sort = F makes sure that the order is based on order_index df which is ordered by coefficient value
abund_abx_group.df <- merge(order_abx_group, abund_abx_group, by="OTU", sort = F)
abund_abx_group.df$OTU <- as.factor(abund_abx_group.df$OTU)
abund_abx_group.df <- abund_abx_group.df %>% mutate(OTU = fct_relevel(OTU, order_abx_group$OTU))

# For each significant feature in each sample, set AbunNotZero == 1 if its 
# abundance is greater than 0. 
abund_abx_group.df$AbunNotZero <- 1*(abund_abx_group.df$Abundance > 0)

# Summarize pathway prevalence by variable of interest
abund_abx_group.df.n0 <- abund_abx_group.df %>% 
  group_by(OTU, abx_group) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(N = n(), SumNotZero = sum(AbunNotZero)) %>%
  mutate(PercentNotZero = 100*(SumNotZero / N)) %>%
  ungroup()
write.csv(abund_abx_group.df.n0, "260205_GM_dev_abx_group_maaslin2_species_prevalence.csv", 
          row.names = F)

prev_p_abx_group <- ggplot(abund_abx_group.df.n0, aes(x = abx_group, y=OTU, fill=PercentNotZero))+
  geom_tile()+
  scale_fill_distiller(palette ='RdBu', type='seq', breaks = c(0,50,100), 'Prevalence (%)')+
  theme_classic()+
  theme(axis.text.y = element_blank(),
        axis.text.x = element_text(size=17, angle=45, hjust=1),
        axis.title.x = element_blank(),
        axis.title.y = element_blank(),
        plot.title = element_text(size=17),
        legend.text = element_text(size = 18),
        panel.border = element_rect(fill=NA, colour="black", size=1))+
  scale_y_discrete(limits=rev)
ggsave("260205_GM_dev_abx_group_MaAslin2_taxa_prev.pdf", plot = prev_p_abx_group, bg = "transparent", width = 11, height = 12)

combined_abx_group <- abxgroup_coeff_p | prev_p_abx_group 
ggsave("260205_GM_dev_MaAslin2_taxa_plot.pdf", plot = combined_abx_group, bg = "transparent", width = 12, height = 6)

############---------------- Other numerical variables ------------------------------------------#########
library(tidytext)
library(plyr)
library(stringr)

perm_cat_vector = c("DOL" = "#3A1F46", "Baseline" = "#7F4B89", "Diet" = "#F3DAE4", "Antibiotic" = "#E3A5D6", "Non-antibiotic medication" = "#7C5467")

taxa_sign_out_num <- taxa_sign_out_filt %>% filter(metadata != "abx_group_updated") %>% 
  mutate(direction = if_else(coef > 0, "Positive", "Negative"),
         feature = reorder_within(feature, coef, metadata)) 
write.csv(taxa_sign_out_num, "260205_sign_MaAslin2_taxa.csv", row.names = F)

taxa_sign_out_num <- read_excel("260205_sign_MaAslin2_taxa.xlsx")
taxa_sign_out_num <- taxa_sign_out_num %>% mutate(direction = if_else(coef > 0, "Positive", "Negative"),
         feature = reorder_within(feature, coef, metadata)) 


taxa_sign_out_num$metadata_category <- factor(taxa_sign_out_num$metadata_category, levels = names(perm_cat_vector))

#obtain min and max coefficient values (needed for plotting later)
min <- min(taxa_sign_out_num$coef)
max <- max(taxa_sign_out_num$coef)

### Generate coefficient plot ####
# Calculate 95% CI for coefficients
#maaslin_taxa <- taxa_sign_out_num %>% mutate(species = fct_reorder(feature, coef))

taxa_sign_out_num$coefmax <- taxa_sign_out_num$coef + taxa_sign_out_num$stderr
taxa_sign_out_num$coefmin <- taxa_sign_out_num$coef - taxa_sign_out_num$stderr

taxa_sign_out_num$CI95upper <- taxa_sign_out_num$coef + 1.96*taxa_sign_out_num$stderr
taxa_sign_out_num$CI95lower <- taxa_sign_out_num$coef - 1.96*taxa_sign_out_num$stderr

taxa_sign_out_num$direction <- factor(taxa_sign_out_num$direction, levels = c("Positive", "Negative"))

library(ggh4x)

genus_color_vector <- c(
  "Veillonella"      = "#A8A55C",  # blue
  "Streptococcus"      = "#68434E",  # green
  "Clostridium"    = "#B07159",  # red
  "Klebsiella"     = "#2F4B7A",  # orange
  "Enterobacter"      = "#8C2B0E",  
  "Staphylococcus"      = "#B47E83",  # brown
  "Enterococcus"  = "#F2A450",  # light blue
  "Escherichia"    = "#9F7E59",  # pink
  "Cutibacterium"          = "#6EA57B",  # lavender
  "Finegoldia"       = "#8DA0CB",  # light yellow
  "Clostridioides"          = "#088096"  
)

custom_genus_colors <- c(

  # --- Bacteroidota: blue-greens ---
  "g__Bacteroides"      = "#088096",
  "g__Parabacteroides"  = "#7AD4E4",

  # --- Actinobacteriota: warm teals ---
  "g__Bifidobacterium"  = "#9AC8A4",
  "g__Cutibacterium"    = "#6EA57B",

  # --- Firmicutes Clostridia: orange-browns ---
  "g__Clostridium"        = "#B07159",
  "g__Erysipelatoclostridium" = "#6C3322",

  # --- Firmicutes Bacilli: pink-reds ---
  "g__Enterococcus"     = "#F2A450",
  "g__Staphylococcus"   = "#B47E83",
  "g__Streptococcus"    = "#68434E",

  # --- Proteobacteria: blue-purple tones ---
  "g__Citrobacter"      = "#DFCB91",
  "g__Enterobacter"     = "#8C2B0E",
  "g__Escherichia"      = "#9F7E59",
  "g__Klebsiella"       = "#2F4B7A",
  "g__Serratia"         = "#7C97C2",

  # --- Negativicutes (Veillonellaceae): olive-greens ---
  "g__Veillonella"      = "#A8A55C",
    # --- Other: neutral gray ---
  "Other"               = "#A9A9A9"   # darkgray
)

custom_colors_top6 <- c("g__Escherichia" = "#9F7E59","g__Enterobacter" = "#8C2B0E", "g__Klebsiella" = "#2F4B7A", "g__Staphylococcus" = "#B47E83","g__Finegoldia" = "#8DA0CB","g__Enterococcus" = "#F2A450")

taxa_dol_coeff <- taxa_sign_out_num %>% filter(metadata_category == "DOL") %>% ggplot(., aes(x = coef , y = feature)) +
  geom_point(aes(color = genus), alpha = 0.9, size = 3) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype='dotted', color='grey', size=1.2)+
  geom_errorbarh(aes(xmax = CI95upper, xmin = CI95lower, height =0.1))+
  facet_wrap2(~ Label, labeller = as_labeller(function(x) {str_wrap(x, width = 20)}), scales = "free_y", ncol = 4) +
  scale_color_manual(values = genus_color_vector, name = "Genus") +
  scale_size_continuous(range = c(2, 10)) +
  scale_y_reordered() +
  theme_linedraw(base_size = 13)+
  labs(
    x = "Model Coefficient",
    y = NULL,
    color = "Direction") +
  theme(
    strip.text = element_text(size = 11, face = "bold"),
    strip.background = element_rect(fill = "#3A1F46", color = "white"),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 11),
    axis.title.x = element_text(size = 11, face = "bold"),
    panel.grid.major.y = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    legend.position = "none")
ggsave("260205_GM_dev_MaAslin2_taxa_DOL_var_coeff_plot.pdf", plot = taxa_dol_coeff, bg = "transparent", width = 5, height = 4)

taxa_baseline_coeff <- taxa_sign_out_num %>% filter(metadata_category == "Baseline") %>% ggplot(., aes(x = coef , y = feature)) +
  geom_point(aes(color = genus), alpha = 0.9, size = 3) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype='dotted', color='grey', size=1.2)+
  geom_errorbarh(aes(xmax = CI95upper, xmin = CI95lower, height =0.1))+
  facet_wrap2(~ Label, labeller = as_labeller(function(x) {str_wrap(x, width = 20)}), scales = "free_y", ncol = 4) +
  scale_color_manual(values = genus_color_vector, name = "Genus") +
  scale_size_continuous(range = c(2, 10)) +
  scale_y_reordered() +
  theme_linedraw(base_size = 13)+
  labs(
    x = "Model Coefficient",
    y = NULL,
    color = "Direction") +
  theme(
    strip.text = element_text(size = 11, face = "bold"),
    strip.background = element_rect(fill = "#7F4B89", color = "white"),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 11),
    axis.title.x = element_text(size = 11, face = "bold"),
    panel.grid.major.y = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    legend.position = "none")
ggsave("260205_GM_dev_MaAslin2_taxa_baseline_var_coeff_plot.pdf", plot = taxa_baseline_coeff, bg = "transparent", width = 4, height = 3)

taxa_diet_coeff <- taxa_sign_out_num %>% filter(metadata_category == "Diet") %>% ggplot(., aes(x = coef , y = feature)) +
  geom_point(aes(color = genus), alpha = 0.9, size = 3) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype='dotted', color='grey', size=1.2)+
  geom_errorbarh(aes(xmax = CI95upper, xmin = CI95lower, height =0.1))+
  facet_wrap2(~ Label, labeller = as_labeller(function(x) {str_wrap(x, width = 20)}), scales = "free_y", ncol = 4) +
  scale_color_manual(values = genus_color_vector, name = "Genus") +
  scale_size_continuous(range = c(2, 10)) +
  scale_y_reordered() +
  theme_linedraw(base_size = 13)+
  labs(
    x = "Model Coefficient",
    y = NULL,
    color = "Direction") +
  theme(
    strip.background = element_rect(fill = "#F3DAE4", color = "black"),
    strip.text = element_text(size = 11, face = "bold", color = "black"),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 11),
    axis.title.x = element_text(size = 11, face = "bold"),
    panel.grid.major.y = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    legend.position = "bottom",
    legend.box = "horizontal")
ggsave("260205_GM_dev_MaAslin2_taxa_diet_var_coeff_plot.pdf", plot = taxa_diet_coeff, bg = "transparent", width = 9, height = 4)

taxa_abx_coeff <- taxa_sign_out_num %>% filter(metadata_category == "Antibiotic") %>% ggplot(., aes(x = coef , y = feature)) +
  geom_point(aes(color = genus), alpha = 0.9, size = 3) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype='dotted', color='grey', size=1.2)+
  geom_errorbarh(aes(xmax = CI95upper, xmin = CI95lower, height =0.1))+
  facet_wrap2(~ Label, labeller = as_labeller(function(x) {str_wrap(x, width = 20)}), scales = "free_y", ncol = 4) +
  scale_color_manual(values = genus_color_vector, name = "Genus") +
  scale_size_continuous(range = c(2, 10)) +
  scale_y_reordered() +
  theme_linedraw(base_size = 13)+
  labs(
    x = "Model Coefficient",
    y = NULL,
    color = "Direction") +
  theme(
    strip.background = element_rect(fill = "#E3A5D6", color = "black"),
    strip.text = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold", color = "black"),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 12),
    axis.title.x = element_text(size = 11, face = "bold"),
    panel.grid.major.y = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    legend.position = "bottom",
    legend.text = element_text(size = 10),
    legend.box = "horizontal")
ggsave("260205_GM_dev_MaAslin2_taxa_abx_var_coeff_plot.pdf", plot = taxa_abx_coeff, bg = "transparent", width = 18, height = 6)

taxa_med_coeff <- taxa_sign_out_num %>% filter(metadata_category == "Non-antibiotic medication") %>% ggplot(., aes(x = coef , y = feature)) +
  geom_point(aes(color = genus), alpha = 0.9, size = 3) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype='dotted', color='grey', size=1.2)+
  geom_errorbarh(aes(xmax = CI95upper, xmin = CI95lower, height =0.1))+
  facet_wrap2(~ Label, labeller = as_labeller(function(x) {str_wrap(x, width = 20)}), scales = "free_y", ncol = 4) +
  scale_color_manual(values = genus_color_vector, name = "Genus") +
  scale_size_continuous(range = c(2, 10)) +
  scale_y_reordered() +
  theme_linedraw(base_size = 13)+
  labs(
    x = "Model Coefficient",
    y = NULL,
    color = "Direction") +
  theme(
    strip.background = element_rect(fill = "#7C5467", color = "black"),
    strip.text = element_text(size = 9, face = "bold", color = "white"),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 14),
    axis.title.x = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),
    panel.grid.major.y = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    legend.position = "none")
ggsave("260205_GM_dev_MaAslin2_taxa_med_var_coeff_plot.pdf", plot = taxa_med_coeff, bg = "transparent", width = 22, height = 8)

###################### ---------------------------- ShortBRED-------------------###########################################
## Merge term infant ARGs with class
arg.map <- read.delim('~/Library/CloudStorage/Box-Box/pppp/GM_development_cohort/Shortbred/ShortBRED_mapping.txt',header = F)

## Merge preterm infant ARGs with class
arg.byclass <- merge(arg_df, arg.map, by.x = 'Family', by.y = 'V1') %>% 
  dplyr::rename(Class = V2)

arg.byclass_preterm <- arg.byclass %>% 
  dplyr::group_by(Sample_ID_R_final, Class) %>% 
  dplyr::summarise(Count = sum(Count))

arg.byclass_preterm.wide <- dcast(arg.byclass_preterm, Sample_ID_R_final ~ Class, value.var = 'Count')
```
